part1.question: Do you work or are you a student?
part1.followUp: What do you enjoy most about your daily routine?

part1.question: Do you like to plan things in advance?
part1.followUp: What kinds of things do you usually plan?

part1.question: How do you usually spend your weekends?
part1.followUp: Would you prefer to have more free time or more money?

part1.question: Do you enjoy cooking?
part1.followUp: What is your favourite dish to prepare?

part2.cueCard: Describe a time when you had to make a difficult decision.
bulletPoints: why it was difficult to make
what the result of your decision was
and explain how you felt after making this decision
followUpQuestions: Do you think young people find it harder to make decisions than older people?
How can parents help their children learn to make good decisions?
Should important decisions be made alone or with the help of others?
Do you think technology helps people make better decisions?
